title: Langtang High-Altitude Monitoring Network
description: Designed and deployed three permanent automated environmental monitoring stations between 4,200m and 5,200m, producing continuous data streams on temperature, humidity, soil moisture, and wildlife presence.

title: Glacial Lake AI Risk Classifier
description: Machine learning system that classifies glacial lakes by outburst flood risk using satellite imagery, terrain data, and historical records. Now used by Nepal's National Disaster Risk Authority.

title: Community Camera Trap Initiative
description: Participatory wildlife monitoring programme training local communities to operate camera traps. Generated the largest snow leopard image dataset in Nepal.

title: TEK Documentation Atlas
description: Interactive online atlas documenting traditional ecological knowledge of medicinal plants across 14 mountain communities in Nepal and Bhutan.
